entries.title: RQPLEIAD_180_04_Emergency_Outgoing_Call_By_Program_Key

entries.title: RQPLEIAD_180_04_Emergency_Outgoing_Call_By_Program_Key
entries.precondition_raw: Phone has the Emergency program key
entries.normalized_precondition: Phone has the Emergency program key
entries.raw_action:
check the function of theese button:
1.press the emergency avatar / new call button2.press the hold key (which is greyed) of the screen or the hold physical button or the hold program key
entries.raw_expected_result: 1.Display the emergency info/add new call screen2.no action， can't hold the call
entries.normalized_action: Press the Emergency avatar or new call button.
entries.normalized_expected_result: The emergency info or add new call screen displays.

entries.raw_action:
Enter the hard keys menu:
User/Device/Hard keys
entries.raw_expected_result:
Title "Edit maximum 2 keys"
The reset to default icon display at the upper left corner of the screen
The left of the options all display the radio button, but only defined hard key is selected
Undefined key and lock key are grey, the unlock defined key name is light
And the cap icon/hard key name display correctly
ALE-300/400: The i icon display at the upper right corner of the screen
